Details

What are dbt meetups? dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

рҹӨқOrganizer: Philip Morris International
рҹҸ Venue Host: Karlovo nГЎm. 2097, 120 00 NovГ© MДӣsto
рҹҚ•Catering: Fingerfood and drinks

вңЁ Agenda & Speakers вңЁ
5:00 PM | Registration & Welcome
5:30 PM | Intro by PMI
5:45 PM | "For Builders, by Builders - What's news at dbt Labs" - рҹҺӨ Stephan Durry (dbt Labs)
6:15 PM | 1. Talk: Running dbt in a Highly Regulated Enterprise - рҹҺӨ (Mike Vilimek, father of dbt @ PMI)
6:45 PM | 15min Breather
7:00 PM | 2. Talk: From Fabric to Fantastic: How dbt Makes Your Lakehouses and Warehouses Shine - рҹҺӨ (Sam Debruyn, dbt Champion & Microsoft MVP)
7:30 PM | The dbt Quiz
7:45 PM | Networking & Community Time

Important Notes:

The venue has capacity limits. Please RSVP if you intend to come and change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going".
The doors open at 5pm. If you arrive before, we may not be ready to welcome you yet!
The doors will close at 5.40pm.
To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

Since 2016, dbt Labs has been on a mission to help data practitioners create and disseminate organizational knowledge. dbt is the standard for AI-ready structured data. Powered by the dbt Fusion engine, it unlocks the performance, context, and trust that organizations need to scale analytics in the era of AI. Globally, more than 60,000 data teams use dbt, including those at Siemens, Roche and CondГ© Nast.

Learn more at getdbt.com, and follow dbt Labs on LinkedIn, X, Instagram, and YouTube

events.raw_text:

Thu, Nov 21, 2024 В· 8:00 PM to 9:00 PM CET

Online event

This event has passed

Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
Network event

99 attendees from 54 groups hosting

D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Prague dbt Meetup
4.7
12 reviews
Details

REGISTER HERE рҹ‘ү https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

рҹҡҖ Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

WeвҖҷre hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

events.raw_text:

Thu, Oct 5, 2023 В· 8:30 AM to 12:00 PM CEST

STRV

RohanskГ© nГЎbЕҷ. 678/23, KarlГӯn В· Praha-Praha 8

Prague dbt Breakfast by STRV

Hosted by Aneta S.

Prague dbt Meetup
4.7
12 reviews
Details

STRV is excited to bring the Czech-based dbt community together for the second time! Our morning meetup will shine a spotlight on data product success stories, so join us bright and early to explore strategies for boosting ROI from your data team using dbt. Great opportunity to connect with fellow analytics engineers and data enthusiasts, and even score some dbt swag.

рҹҸ Venue Host: STRV, RohanskГ© nГЎbЕҷeЕҫГӯ 678/23, Prague 186 00
рҹӨқOrganizer: STRV
рҹ§ҚHosts: Jozef Reginac from STRV, Michal Kolacek from Slido

рҹ“қAgenda

8:30 - 9:00 | Check in/Registration
9:00 - 9:10 | Welcome Remarks by Meetup Hosts
9:10 - 9:20 | Lightning Talk #1: How to Deliver Data Products Fast With dbt - by Arthur Mills from EssenceMediacom
9:20 - 9:25 | Q&A
9:25 - 9:35 | Lightning Talk #2: TBA - by Veronika Peskova from GAMEE
9:35 - 9:40 | Q&A
9:40 - 9:50 | Lightning Talk #3: 27 clinics, 12 systems, 1 solution: integration using dbt - by Matej Novak from RevoltBI
9:50 - 9:55 | Q&A
10:00 - 10:45 | Panel Discussion: How to Maximize Data TeamвҖҷs ROI? - by all speakers and special guest Giuliano Giannetti, CEO of RevoltBI
10:45 - 12:00 | Networking

---
рҹ—ЈпёҸPresentation #1: How to Deliver Data Products Fast With dbt
Description: Ever been roped into a project at the last minute and asked to build an end-to-end solution by yesterday? Or you just joined a company and someone asked if you can SELECT * FROM some_ideal_clean_and_pristine.table_that_you_think_exists ?
In this talk, I'll be discussing how to build data products fast, based on my general experience working with dbt at an enterprise company and a ludicrously stressful project that I worked on earlier this year.
---
рҹ—ЈпёҸPresentation #2: Cheater detection: tackling a moving target with data
Description: The gaming industry is in constant battle with cheaters. To tackle this problem, it's crucial to leverage data and spark collaboration with product teams and developers. The talk aims to showcase the ongoing effort to detect cheating patterns and come up with counteractive measures to ensure a fair and enjoyable gaming experience for players.
---
рҹ—ЈпёҸPresentation #3: 27 clinics, 12 systems, 1 solution: integration using dbt
Description: Data Integration: Join me for a lightning talk on how we used dbt to integrate 27 clinics in 8 countries with multiple diverse source systems, showcasing the power of efficient data management.
вҖ”
To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb

EVENT DETAILS:
Our venue has capacity limits, so please only RSVP if you intend to come. Reach out to events@strv.com if you need to cancel last minute or change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going."

By taking part in this event, you grant the event organizers, STRV, full rights to the use of images resulting from the photography/video filming, and any reproductions or adaptations of the images for fundraising, publicity, or other purposes. This might include (but is not limited to): the right to use them in printed and online publicity, social media, and press releases. If you do not wish to be photographed, please inform an event organizer during check-in.

вһЎпёҸ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
рҹӨқFor the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-czsk channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

dbt is a data transformation framework that lets analysts and engineers collaborate using their shared knowledge of SQL. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbtвҖҷs analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust.
Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

events.raw_text:

Thu, Sep 15, 2022 В· 6:00 PM to 10:00 PM CEST

STRV

RohanskГ© nГЎbЕҷ. 678/23, KarlГӯn В· Praha-Praha 8

Prague dbt Meetup (in-person)

Hosted by Aneta S.

Prague dbt Meetup
4.7
12 reviews
Details

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! STRV is excited to be bringing the Czech-based dbt community together for the first time! The talks focus on experiences with dbt and topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing and team structures. Come build connections with analytics engineers and data enthusiasts. What is dbt? Learn more at getdbt.com

вһЎпёҸ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
рҹӨқFor the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-czsk channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).
---------------

рҹҸ Venue Host: STRV, RohanskГ© nГЎbЕҷeЕҫГӯ 678/23, Prague 186 00
рҹҚ•Catering: Mummies & Daddies Catering
рҹӨқOrganizer: STRV
рҹ“қAgenda

6:00 - 6:30pm | Check in/ Registration
6:30 - 6:35pm | Welcome Remarks by Meetup Host
6:40 - 7:00pm | Presentation #1: Essay on Data Product
7:00 - 7:20pm | Presentation #2: Running Python Scripts Directly From Your dbt Projects
7:20 - 7:40pm | Presentation #3: Data Modeling as the First Data Hire
7:40 - 8:00pm | Presentation #4: Boosting DX With Automated Data Sandbox Macro
8:00 - 8:05pm | IRL Closing Remarks by Meetup Host
8:05 - 10:00pm | Networking

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb
---
рҹ—ЈпёҸPresentation #1: Essay on Data Product by Jozef Reginac

Description: Many think data teams create reports, dashboards and pivot charts. But we think our purpose is to help make better decisions. LetвҖҷs take the Product Management framework and define the data product вҖ” with a bit of a plot twist.

Speaker bio: Jozef was the first data engineer at STRV. Once a long-time data analyst, he got pissed and became an analytics engineer thanks to dbt. Jozef likes good filter coffee, open source projects and filmography.
---
рҹ—ЈпёҸPresentation #2: Running Python Scripts Directly From Your dbt Projects by Jan Maly

Description: There are many use cases that you can't solve with SQL & dbt, but the Python ecosystem is perfect for that. For example, you must perform complex transformations or use ML models. LetвҖҷs learn about fal that allows you to run Python scripts directly from your dbt project.

Speaker bio: Jan Maly leads the Data Science Team at STRV. With a passion about AI and its potential to transform business, heвҖҷs been in charge of multiple data-driven projects involving Machine Learning and Advanced Data Analytics. Jan has also recently become a father.
---
рҹ—ЈпёҸPresentation #3: Data Modeling as the First Data Hire by Simon Podhajsky

Description: Coming into a company as the first data hire can be overwhelming вҖ” it certainly was for me! This lightning talk aims to distill the most important lessons for those who are considering the jump. (dbt can help.)

Speaker bio: Simon is a Data Lead at a small California seed-stage startup, though вҖңData EverythingвҖқ is more apt. Prior to selling out, he worked in neuroscience research at Stanford and Yale. Loves talking all things dbt, the academia/industry interface, remote work or anything else!

рҹ—ЈпёҸPresentation #4: Boosting DX With Automated Data Sandbox Macro by Honza Rasa

Description: All about the power of dbt's macros and built-in access to models graph. Learn how to create an isolated (Snowflake) environment through dbt macro with all model dependencies вҖ” which comes in handy if youвҖҷre manually loading tables into your DEV schema or want an automated isolated schema for CI pipelines to dry-run your models.

Speaker bio: Honza works as a data engineer at Productboard, where he is mixing his experience from backend development with the data world. He focuses mainly on the data architecture and applying software engineering principles in this area.
---

EVENT DETAILS:
Doors open at 6 p.m. and weвҖҷll be kicking the event off promptly at 6:30 p.m. Guests are welcome to hang around all the way until 10 p.m. Food and refreshments will be provided.

Our venue has capacity limits, so please only RSVP if you intend to come. Reach out to aneta.stepankova@strv.com if you need to cancel last minute or change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going."

By taking part in this event, you grant the event organizers full rights to the use of images resulting from the photography/video filming, and any reproductions or adaptations of the images for fundraising, publicity, or other purposes. This might include (but is not limited to): the right to use them in printed and online publicity, social media, and press releases. If you do not wish to be photographed, please inform an event organizer during check-in.
